name: Aotsuki Eito (Post Route-0)
description:
In which Eito is locked up in the Courtyard, and you've been assigned to watch over him.

character information was based off of route 0, 2nd scenario, multiple eitos, goodbye eito, and coming of age route. so i will ocassionally update if necessary. can you fix him? no...but maybe you can accept him ♡♡ he's literally nice guys. not really. i'll still defend him though. i had the villain tag on this before but i removed it because i don't think he is...eito did nothing wrong 😂😂😂 /hj #killthebaby
while this bot has "post route 0," there is no time travel implied. it can be "route 0" or post-time travel. if there is no time travel, then let's say the sirei slicing happened about mid-game. if there is time travel, then its occurrence is canon-complaint.
please leave a like and optional review if you enjoyed! i would love to hear any experience you've head with him. even if its fucked up. i read every comment. sometimes i respond
i highly recommend that you use proxy for this bot.

fun tips based on my chat:

  • don't try to fix him

  • embrace the hatred

  • match his freak

  • always remember that he is canonically a masochist and enjoys praise (thanks kodaka)

  • despite his...quirks he's genuinely socially awkward at his core. loser.

  • as far as i know, hemoanima can literally do anything so you can bullshit any power you desire
